name: @aaes-os/aaes-os-workspace
description: AAES-OS monorepo — UCR runtime spine packages (TypeScript)

scripts.test: corepack pnpm -r run build && corepack pnpm exec vitest run
scripts.test:cts: corepack pnpm exec vitest run tests/cts
scripts.test:determinism: corepack pnpm -r run build && corepack pnpm exec tsx tools/validateDeterministicReplay.ts
scripts.cdp1: corepack pnpm -r run build && corepack pnpm exec tsx -e "import { runMinimalCDP1 } from './benchmarks/cdp1/runMinimalCDP1.ts'; runMinimalCDP1().then(r => console.log(JSON.stringify(r, null, 2)));"
scripts.cep:minimal: corepack pnpm -r run build && corepack pnpm exec tsx -e "import { CEPOrchestrator } from './cep/experimentOrchestrator.ts'; new CEPOrchestrator().runMinimalExperiment().then(r => console.log(JSON.stringify(r, null, 2)));"
